instruction: The **SF Site Survey SAPI** (System API) provides direct Salesforce integration for retrieving Site Survey and Service Request data. It enables upstre using DataWeave Transform, HTTP Listener with API endpoint /${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*
model_output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation=" http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger/current/mule-json-logger.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin/current/mule-error-handler-plugin.xsd">
    <flow name="sf-site-survey-sapi-main">
        <http:listener config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
        <json-logger:logger doc:name="Log initial request payload" doc:id="697a2c0e-0d7f-4b31-b500-135922523217" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Initial Request Payload" tracePoint="BEFORE_REQUEST"/>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-site-survey-sapi-config"/>
		<error-handler >
			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="65955214-6311-4975-a154-158656565555" >
				<error-handler-plugin:on-error doc:name="Process Error" doc:id="65955214-6311-4975-a154-158656565555" config-ref="Error_Handler_Plugin_Config" badRequestError='#["There was an issue with your request message." ++ error.description]'/>
				<set-variable value="#[attributes.httpStatus]" doc:name="Set Http Status Code" doc:id="65955214-6311-4975-a154-158656565555" variableName="httpStatus"/>
				<json-logger:logger doc:name="Log APIkit error response" doc:id="65955214-6311-4975-a154-158656565555" config-ref="JSON_Logger_Config" message="Error response from APIkit router" tracePoint="EXCEPTION"/>
			</on-error-propagate>
		</error-handler>
    </flow>
    <flow name="get:\sitesurvey\ids:sf-site-survey-sapi-config">
		<flow-ref doc:name="get-site-survey-ids-flow" doc:id="697a2c0e-0d7f-4b31-b500-135922523217" name="get-site-survey-ids-flow"/>
    </flow>
    <flow name="post:\servicer
expected_output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<mule xmlns:error-handler-plugin="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/error-handler-plugin" xmlns:json-logger="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/json-logger" xmlns="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core" xmlns:apikit="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit" xmlns:doc="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/documentation" xmlns:ee="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core" xmlns:http="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd

	<flow name="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-main">
        <http:listener path="/${api.name}/api/${api.version}/*" config-ref="HTTPS_Listener_config" doc:name="HTTP Listener ">
            <http:response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 200]">
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:response>
            <http:error-response statusCode="#[vars.httpStatus default 500]">
                <http:body><![CDATA[#[payload]]]></http:body>
                <http:headers><![CDATA[#[vars.outboundHeaders default {}]]]></http:headers>
            </http:error-response>
        </http:listener>
		<ee:transform doc:name="originalPayload" doc:id="c86f4dd6-1c1a-47be-a0c9-ed2a8c916530" >
			<ee:message >
			</ee:message>
			<ee:variables >
				<ee:set-variable variableName="originalPayload" ><![CDATA[%dw 2.0
import * from dw::core::Strings
output application/java
var path =attributes.maskedRequestPath
---
if(path as String == "/sitesurvey") (payload)
else
({
	"siteSurveyId" : substringAfterLast(path,'/')
})]]></ee:set-variable>
			</ee:variables>
		</ee:transform>

			<json-logger:content ><![CDATA[#[output application/json ---
{
    payload: (vars.originalPayload) 
}]]]></json-logger:content>
		</json-logger:logger>
		<apikit:router config-ref="sf-sitesurvey-sapi-config"/>

			<on-error-propagate enableNotifications="true" logException="true" doc:name="On Error Propagate" doc:id="8720f1fd-dead-4ad4-be79-0276bcefc7a2" >
